title: messages-v1
description: Messaging platform contract v1 — 18 operations across conversations, messages, contacts, threads, reactions, and delivery.

operations.name: messages
operations.description: Get messages from a conversation with pagination

operations.name: chat
operations.description: Get a specific conversation by ID or contact identifier

operations.name: stats
operations.description: Aggregate statistics (message counts, date ranges, top contacts)

operations.name: threads
operations.description: Get thread replies for a message

operations.name: members
operations.description: List participants or members of a conversation

operations.name: pins
operations.description: List pinned or starred messages in a conversation

operations.name: channels
operations.description: Discover available channels or rooms to join

operations.name: presence
operations.description: User online, offline, or away status

operations.name: send
operations.description: Send a text message to a contact or conversation

operations.name: send_file
operations.description: Send a file attachment to a contact or conversation

operations.name: react
operations.description: Add or remove a reaction to a message
